title: SAFARI-IGHJ: From Computational Prediction to In Vivo Proof — Code, Data, and Validation Scripts
description: Source code for the SAFARI-IGHJ pipeline (v1 and v2), SAFARI-Score ML classifier, V(D)J validation framework, and all analysis scripts associated with the manuscript 'From Computational Prediction to In Vivo Proof: Large-Scale Validation of SAFARI-IGHJ Across 11.4 Million Reads Confirms Immunoglobulin J Gene Functionality in Wild Ruminants'. Includes validation BAM files from 13 species across 7 Bovidae tribes.

creators.name: Correia, Jean Pierre
creators.affiliation: Digital Balance AI -- Digital Labs Independent Research Group

notes: This release accompanies the manuscript submitted to BMC Genomics. Validation BAM files (>2 GB total) are available as separate Zenodo uploads due to size constraints.
